examples: It demonstrated vividly the possibility of assimilating contemporary popular music into the symphonic tradition.
Johnson was an innovator in classical music, composing symphonic music that incorporated American, and especially African American, traditions.
A product of the late Romantic period, the concerto also has its heroic symphonic sections.
The Chinese director Zhang Yimou, having previously worked on a restrained scale, decides to go symphonic.
The "Dragon Tattoo" duo say their icy, ominous score wasn't intended as a rebuke of symphonic schmaltz.
